title: Exploding Chickens
description: Adds exploding chickens to your game
body:
Welcome. This is a simple mod that adds an explosive chicken that hunts you down in order to explode you into oblivion. If you like chickens and want extra challenge while playing minecraft, this mod is for you. To differentiate between the two chickens, look for a chicken wildly flapping it's wings. That's the explosive one.

  FEATURES:

- An exploding chicken, hunts you down from very far away

- An exploding egg you can chuck at your enemies

  You can even craft the exploding chicken!

Just Imagine how many "Fun" pranks you can pull on mobs or friends!
